source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 梅西帽子戏法 并列世界杯射手王
topics.official_english: Messi hat-trick ties World Cup all-time scoring record
topics.why_hot: Messi scored a hat-trick in Argentina's 3-0 win over Algeria, tying the World Cup all-time scoring record, sparking massive fan celebration.
topics.share_angle: Explain Messi's historic achievement and its significance in World Cup history.

topics.official_english: Trillions of yuan in investment 'pouring in'
topics.why_hot: Reports of massive new investment plans signal economic stimulus, drawing public attention to economic outlook.
topics.share_angle: Break down the scale and potential impact of these investments on ordinary people.

topics.chinese_topic: 陆家嘴论坛上 央行带来新政策利好
topics.official_english: PBOC announces new policy benefits at Lujiazui Forum
topics.why_hot: Central bank's new policies at the Lujiazui Forum are seen as positive for markets and the economy.
topics.share_angle: Summarize the key policy takeaways and what they mean for investors and consumers.

topics.official_english: Gasoline prices may fall back to 7 yuan per liter
topics.why_hot: Potential drop in gasoline prices directly affects household budgets, a livelihood issue.
topics.share_angle: Explain the reasons behind the price drop and its impact on daily life.

topics.chinese_topic: 人造谣“有人驾车抢女学生”被拘
topics.official_english: Rumor-monger detained for false claim of 'car abduction of female student'
topics.why_hot: Rumor caused public panic; detention highlights consequences of spreading false information.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the dangers of online rumors and legal consequences.

topics.chinese_topic: 岁女孩误把10厘米肿瘤当正常发育
topics.official_english: Girl mistook 10cm tumor for normal growth
topics.why_hot: Health scare story raises awareness about pediatric tumor symptoms and medical check-ups.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the importance of early detection and regular health checks for children.

topics.chinese_topic: 男子养309条蟒蛇 案值超3000万
topics.official_english: Man kept 309 pythons worth over 30 million yuan
topics.why_hot: Illegal wildlife trade case with huge scale shocks the public and highlights enforcement.
topics.share_angle: Explain the legal and ecological issues around illegal wildlife trade.

topics.chinese_topic: 真的会出事！出门前请检查这根线
topics.official_english: Safety warning: Check this cord before leaving home
topics.why_hot: Viral safety tip about a common household hazard resonates widely.
topics.share_angle: Share practical safety advice that could prevent accidents.
